# Tables and Figures

<!-- Figures/tables are generated by scripts/100_WarmingImpactsAlfalfa_exhibits.R and
     stored under output/exhibits/. Underlying data under output/exhibits/figure_data/. -->

## Tables

**Table 1: Means and standard deviations of county level alfalfa production and weather**

```{r table1}
knitr::kable(objs$summary$tab, row.names = FALSE)
```

*Notes: Summary statistics are based on data from 1950 to 2024.*

**Table 2: Regression coefficients**

```{r table2}
knitr::kable(objs$coef$tab, row.names = FALSE)
```

*Coefficients and standard errors are reported ×1000; the †† in the column header marks the preferred window (`r objs$window_selection$chosen_months` months). Significance levels: \* p<0.10, \*\* p<0.05, \*\*\* p<0.01. Standard errors in parentheses, clustered at year level.*

## Figures

**Figure 1. Alfalfa and Cattle Producing Areas in the U.S. (2002-2022)**

![Figure 1](../output/exhibits/spatial_Rep.png)

**Figure 2. Decomposition of Cattle-Inventory Responsiveness into Own-County and Neighboring Production**

![Figure 2](../output/exhibits/associations.png)

**Figure 3. Baseline Alfalfa Availability and the Responsiveness of Cattle Inventory to Availability**

![Figure 3](../output/exhibits/availability_cattle.png)

**Figure 4. Distribution of Regression Variables**

![Figure 4](../output/exhibits/regression_variables.png)

**Figure 5. Nonlinear Relation Between Temperature and U.S. Alfalfa Yields (1951-2022)**

![Figure 5](../output/exhibits/Nonlinear_Relation.png)

**Figure 6. Agro-Climatic Clusters: Estimated Temperature Thresholds and Degree-Day Responses**

![Figure 6](../output/exhibits/cluster_knot_outcomes.png)

**Figure 7. Predicted Alfalfa Yield Impacts: National Means and County-Level Detail**

![Figure 7](../output/exhibits/predicted_mean_and_county_impacts_yield.png)

**Figure 8. Predicted County-Level Alfalfa Availability Impacts by Warming Scenario**

![Figure 8](../output/exhibits/predicted_county_impacts_availability.png)

**Figure 9. Predicted County-Level Cattle Inventory Impacts by Warming Scenario**

![Figure 9](../output/exhibits/predicted_county_impacts_cattle.png)
